name: Sarang
headline: Software Engineer
summary: I am a Research Engineer at LG Soft India working as a software engineer across two LG projects: an embedded automotive systems platform and Cybellum, an LG-owned security application where my work focuses on backend services, APIs, asynchronous workflows, containers, and secure multi-tenant foundations.
availability: Open to software engineering, backend, platform, embedded, automotive, and cloud-native roles.

metrics.label: LG projects across embedded systems and Cybellum backend engineering
AUTOSAR, STATIC, and CERT compliance findings resolved
CGPA in Computer Science and Engineering

lgProjects.name: Embedded Systems Project
lgProjects.label: LG Project 01
bullets: Designed Android Binder IPC between native C++ services using Bn/Bp classes for low-latency communication across ECU modules.
Developed OS-layer software using C++, Yocto Build System, and Android Framework for automotive ECU environments.
Built security modules to block unauthorized packets through IP and VLAN-based access rules.
Implemented multithreaded native modules with mutex-backed thread safety and GoogleTest coverage.

lgProjects.name: Cybellum
lgProjects.label: LG Project 02
bullets: Worked on backend technologies for Cybellum, an LG-owned application for automotive product security and SBOM workflows.
Developed backend services for SBOM management and automated vulnerability analysis using Flask and SQLAlchemy.
Integrated RabbitMQ for asynchronous task processing across vulnerability scanning and analysis workflows.
Supported containerized deployments with Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm, and helped shape IAM services with RBAC.

systems.title: Embedded Systems
systems.text: Automotive ECU software, Android Binder IPC, OS-layer services, Yocto Build System, AUTOSAR quality, CMake, and thread-safe C++ modules.

systems.title: Backend Engineering
systems.text: Flask, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, SQLAlchemy, RBAC, IAM, asynchronous processing, and secure service boundaries.

systems.title: Cloud Native Delivery
systems.text: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, RabbitMQ, scalable deployments, service orchestration, and production-oriented environments.

systems.title: Frontend and Product UI
systems.text: React.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, data-driven interfaces, responsive layouts, and portfolio-grade interaction design.

personalProjects.name: TourZ
personalProjects.description: Full-stack marketplace for booking and advertising tours, featuring JWT authentication, pagination, dynamic filtering, and commenting.

personalProjects.name: BlogZ
personalProjects.description: Microservices-based blogging platform with a custom event bus for post creation, comment handling, and modular containerized service deployment.

achievements.title: SWPCT cleared
achievements.detail: Software Proficiency Certification Test at LG Soft India
